reason: Development preparation found that 2024-11-04 had 19 rather than 20 liquidity-qualified targets while all source-integrity checks passed. The frozen unknown-input rule makes a below-minimum decision global NO_ACTION; build_panel already skipped that week, but prepare incorrectly escalated it to a whole-stage source-quality failure before any return output was computed.
changes: Keep the below-minimum week and count in data_quality_development.json as a global NO_ACTION decision.
